queries.query: Audit the product pipeline
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; explicit audit verb.

queries.query: Something feels off in the backlog
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; vague concern prompts diagnostic sweep.

queries.query: Check for issues before release
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; pre-milestone health check.

queries.query: Something's off with the backlog — find what
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'something's off' is audit-intent (diagnosis).

queries.query: Run the health check across our product artifacts
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'health check' is the audit description verb.

queries.query: Look for stale ideas and broken roadmap refs
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — enumerated audit dimensions without the word 'audit'.

queries.query: Do a pre-milestone sweep across BACKLOG and ROADMAP
queries.rationale: Audit surface — pre-milestone comprehensive check.

queries.query: Find stale captured ideas and priority imbalance in the backlog
queries.rationale: Audit surface — two named audit dimensions in one query.

queries.query: Run cross-reference integrity checks across product artifacts
queries.rationale: Audit surface — cross-reference integrity is the audit's own phrasing.

queries.query: I want a diagnostic report with recommended fixes for the pipeline
queries.rationale: Audit surface — diagnostic report + interactive fixes is the audit output.

queries.query: Quick status check
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status (Appendix A); read-only pulse, no report written.

queries.query: Audit engineering gates
queries.rationale: Near-miss from Appendix A; routes to Temper's engineering audit, not arc product audit.

queries.query: Show me a 30-second project overview
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status; quick read-only overview.

queries.query: What's the status of the current wave?
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status; read-only wave state.

queries.query: Capture this issue — backlog items don't match ROADMAP
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-capture; raw issue entry despite audit-like content.

queries.query: Shape the 'audit dashboard' idea into a brief
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-shape; refinement despite the word 'audit'.

queries.query: Plan the next wave with these shaped ideas
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-wave; forward planning, not diagnostic review.

queries.query: Sync the README with the latest audit findings
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-sync; README management after an audit, not the audit itself.

queries.query: Run security audit on the authentication code
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; security/code audit, not arc product audit.

queries.query: Audit our AWS cost allocation for last quarter
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; finance audit, not arc product artifacts.
